exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your home renovation forward
items: Create a detailed scope of work document listing all renovation tasks by room and priority level
Research local building permit requirements and apply for necessary permits before starting work
Establish a realistic renovation budget with 20% contingency fund and track all estimated costs
Schedule professional home inspection to identify structural issues and code violations before renovation planning
Measure and document all rooms, windows, and architectural features with detailed floor plans and photos
